repairs.summary: Reconciled 38 exact-location food rows across the restaurant-issued and linked Toast sources; restored four menu sections; normalized two malformed names; removed three duplicates and one beverage; restored Dairy Free Margherita, 8 Makes a Pie, and Side of Ranch; and applied the universal pizza-crust wheat/gluten disclosure.
verificationCommands: node --test --test-name-pattern='Atlas and Andy.s reconciles the current Navy Yard menu' scripts/restaurant-pipeline.test.mjs

notes: Focused Atlas/Andy's regression passed with 38 unique products, 32 direct positive disclosures, and 6 accurately unavailable results.
